title: BBBoatHud
description: A highly customizable Boat HUD for Ice Boat Racing
body:
# Description

Based on other HUDs like [https://modrinth.com/mod/boathud-1.21](https://modrinth.com/mod/boathud-1.21) and [https://github.com/Pigalala/BoatHud](https://github.com/Pigalala/BoatHud) (And using textures from there with permission).

Use `/bb_boat_hud` to configure the HUD

This mod contains multiple "Modules" you can pick and choose from to design your prefect HUD!

Additionally, more modules can be added in via a resource pack. These modules can have custom textures and logic using Lua.

[Documentation is here](https://gitlab.com/billyg270/bb_boat_hud/-/blob/master/README.md?ref_type=heads), but feel free to join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/Pyfgz8t9u5) and ask as many questions as you need.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/8MuHc0W1cc8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
